about.en: Dymension is a Layer 1 blockchain built for RollApps, modular chains connected through IBC. DYM is used for staking, governance, and network activity.
about.es: Dymension es una blockchain de capa 1 (Layer 1) creada para RollApps, cadenas modulares conectadas mediante IBC. DYM se utiliza para staking (staking), gobernanza (governance) y actividad de red.
about.ca: Dymension és una blockchain de capa 1 (Layer 1) creada per a RollApps, cadenes modulars connectades mitjançant IBC. DYM s'utilitza per a staking (staking), governança (governance) i activitat de xarxa.
